name: Elkjøp Nordic
entry_offer: Commerce Optimization Pilot — product discovery audit and quick-win merchandising improvements across Elkjøp's 100K+ SKU catalog. Focus on search relevance, category merchandising and B2B catalog data quality.
primary_buyer_title: Chief Brand and Digital Officer, Elkjøp Nordic
buyer_outreach_angle: B2B commerce payments expansion across Nordic markets demands better product discovery and catalog data quality — position JAKALA as making the B2B commerce investment work harder.
timing_signal: B2B commerce expansion is a stated priority and Elkjøp's 100K+ SKU catalog across 6 markets creates structural product data fragmentation that directly limits digital revenue.
core_problem: Elkjøp has one of the largest product catalogs in the Nordics — small improvements in search relevance, category merchandising and product data quality translate directly into significant revenue uplift.
tech_stack_highlight: Ecommerce platform likely Salesforce Commerce Cloud or custom; product data fragmentation across vendors, categories and markets is a known challenge. Part of Currys plc group.

name: Trumf / NorgesGruppen
entry_offer: Data Revenue Diagnostic — Trumf loyalty data, personalization and commercial data monetization. Assess what commercial value lies untapped in 2.9M member transaction data across Kiwi, MENY, Spar and Joker chains.
primary_buyer_title: Commercial Director (newly created role), Trumf AS
buyer_outreach_angle: Rikke is new in a newly created Commercial Director role with responsibility for digital services and commercial development — she is actively setting her agenda for the first 90 days and is open to new initiatives.
timing_signal: NorgesGruppen shut down its internal retail media initiative in 2025, publicly acknowledging it 'did not become large enough' — the strongest possible buy signal that they need external help with data monetization.
core_problem: Trumf has Norway's richest grocery transaction dataset with 2.9M active members but has failed to monetize it alone — JAKALA unlocks personalization, partner monetization and retail media capabilities.
tech_stack_highlight: SAS Analytics confirmed for NorgesGruppen; Forte Digital is existing digital strategy partner. New front-end platform under construction — technical opening for personalization layer integration.

name: Sport Outlet (Invent Sport)
entry_offer: Commerce Optimization Pilot — multi-brand PIM and product data diagnostic across Dynamic Brands' 18 webshops. Deliver diagnosis + roadmap + proof-of-concept on 1–2 brands in 6–8 weeks.
primary_buyer_title: CEO, Invent Sport / Sport Outlet
buyer_outreach_angle: Both CTO and CDO roles are currently vacant — Tor-André is the decision-maker and the digital agenda is escalating to the top team right now, creating a direct CEO entry window.
timing_signal: Both CTO and CDO positions are actively being recruited (March 2026) — the technology agenda is being escalated now, and 18 parallel webshops under Invent Sport create an immediate multi-brand product data problem.
core_problem: 18 parallel webshops with no confirmed shared PIM creates fragmented product data, inconsistent search experiences, and scaling risk as Sport Outlet expands toward 150–200 stores.
tech_stack_highlight: Ecommerce platform unknown (likely internal/custom multi-brand setup); no confirmed PIM — CTO search signals infrastructure improvement need. 18 webshops under Invent Sport umbrella.

name: Helly Hansen
entry_offer: Commerce Optimization Pilot — Adobe Commerce multi-site product data audit and search quality assessment across 55 sites with 65,000 SKUs per site. Identify top conversion improvements for the DTC channel.
primary_buyer_title: CMO, Helly Hansen
buyer_outreach_angle: Post-Kontoor acquisition (June 2025) creates a window for new strategic partners — Kontoor's Investor Day in September 2026 means Joumana is building the digital strategy narrative right now.
timing_signal: Kontoor Brands acquired Helly Hansen in June 2025 — new ownership, new leadership, new budget, and Investor Day in September 2026 means the digital strategy preparation window is open now.
core_problem: 55 Adobe Commerce sites with 65,000 SKUs per site creates massive product data complexity — inconsistent data across markets directly limits DTC conversion and the growth targets Kontoor has set from 2027.
tech_stack_highlight: Adobe Commerce (Magento) — 55 sites on one installation; Adobe Experience Manager for CMS; Salesforce CRM; Vaimo as existing ecommerce partner. Two open roles: Senior Director Ecommerce Europe + Director Digital Brand Experience.

name: Varner Group
entry_offer: Data Revenue Diagnostic — multi-brand product data, PIM and personalization across 7 fashion brands. Map the commercial value sitting untapped in product data and customer data across Cubus, Dressmann, Bik Bok, Carlings, Volt, Junkyard, and Levi's franchise.
primary_buyer_title: CTO / CDO, Varner Group (identifiable via varner.com/work-in-it)
buyer_outreach_angle: Sitoo Unified Commerce rollout across 1,150+ stores completed in 2025 — the natural next question is: what do we do with all this data across 7 brands? Revenue is below historical target, creating ROI pressure.
timing_signal: Sitoo implementation completed in 2025 (RTIH Innovation Award winner) — structured store data is now available. The next logical step is connecting this with ecommerce and PIM layer. Revenue below target (NOK 11.4B vs 12.5B goal) adds urgency.
core_problem: 7 brands, 1,150+ stores, 6 separate webshops with no confirmed shared product data layer — Varner cannot personalize at scale or activate the Sitoo investment without a unified data architecture.
tech_stack_highlight: Sitoo POS + Unified Commerce (1,150+ stores); Swisslog AutoStore DC (Vänersborg); 6 separate ecommerce sites (platform unconfirmed); GetaDigital as ecommerce management partner; Zendesk CRM. No shared PIM confirmed.

name: Vinmonopolet
entry_offer: Data Revenue Diagnostic — product data structure, taste profile AI readiness and personalization readiness. Map the AI recommendation potential across 17,000+ SKUs with rich taste profiles, origin data, food pairings and purchase behavior.
primary_buyer_title: Director Digitalization (CDO), Vinmonopolet
buyer_outreach_angle: Espen is new as CDO (2024), came from 15 years at XXL as CIO/Omnichannel Director — he deeply understands ecommerce personalization and is in honeymoon phase building his digital agenda from scratch.
timing_signal: New CDO Espen Terland (ex-XXL 15 years) appointed in 2024 and is actively building his digital agenda — honeymoon phase means he is open to external strategic partners now before his roadmap is set.
core_problem: Vinmonopolet holds Norway's richest product data universe for wine and spirits — taste profiles, origin, food pairing, purchase history — but has no AI-driven recommendations, losing ground to Vivino and international analogues.
tech_stack_highlight: Salesforce Service Cloud confirmed; .NET backend with Nginx/HAProxy; 17,000+ SKUs with rich metadata. Secondary buyer: Lars Thorenfeldt (Director Category, Procurement and Digitalization) — co-buyer for product data initiatives.

name: Skeidar
entry_offer: Commerce Optimization Pilot — product data and digital furniture portal benchmark. Structured review of skeidar.no product data model, benchmarked against Norwegian and Nordic furniture portals, with prioritized conversion improvement recommendations.
primary_buyer_title: CIO / IT Director, Skeidar
buyer_outreach_angle: Sujit owns Dynamics 365 Commerce and just signed SpectrumOne CDP — a CDP investment without optimized product data delivers half the value, making this a perfectly timed entry for JAKALA.
timing_signal: SpectrumOne CDP recently signed and 21.5% YoY revenue growth (Norway's fastest-growing furniture chain) — the company has both the budget and the publicly stated ambition to become 'Norway's best online furniture portal'.
core_problem: Skeidar has publicly declared its goal to become Norway's best online furniture portal, but Dynamics 365 Commerce furniture product data with variants, fabric choices and configurations is notoriously underdeveloped without specialist optimization.
tech_stack_highlight: Microsoft Dynamics 365 Commerce (implemented by BE-terna); SpectrumOne (TargetEveryone) CDP recently signed; 52 warehouses with real-time stock; Loyalty club active. CEO Martin Andresen also identified as buyer.

name: Norrøna
entry_offer: Shopify Check-up (€15–25K) — platform audit and replatform readiness assessment for norrona.com. Assess current platform, multi-market requirements (NO/EU/US), product attribute complexity, D2C performance vs. wholesale, and replatform business case.
primary_buyer_title: Head of Digital / Ecommerce (TBD); CEO/Owner Jørgen Jørgensen as ultimate decision-maker
buyer_outreach_angle: Norrøna's US expansion (Boulder, CO office open) is creating multi-market ecommerce complexity — their no-discount policy means conversion depends entirely on product presentation and discovery quality, not promotions.
timing_signal: Active US market expansion underway and new Oslo flagship opened — D2C revenue of $19M online is growing but likely constrained by a legacy EPiServer platform built at a different scale.
core_problem: No-discount brand with technically complex outdoor products across 3 markets — conversion depends entirely on product presentation, search quality, and shopping experience. Legacy platform likely limits both conversion and multi-market scaling.
tech_stack_highlight: Legacy EPiServer-based platform (2014, likely updated); multi-language, multi-currency (NO/EU/US); upcycled collections requiring new taxonomy workflows. Family-owned, 4th generation — long decision cycles.

name: GANT Norway
entry_offer: Data Revenue Diagnostic — Club GANT personalization and DTC conversion audit. Assess how Club GANT data is activated in Dynamic Yield, benchmark gant.no DTC conversion vs. Zalando, and identify quick wins in the new SFCC/Dynamic Yield stack.
primary_buyer_title: Country Manager / Head of Ecommerce, GANT Norway (not yet identified)
buyer_outreach_angle: GANT is mid-implementation of a new composable stack (SFCC + Dynamic Yield + Contentful + Cegid + Ingrid) with IMPACT Commerce just onboarded — the window for a data and personalization specialist is open now alongside the tech rollout.
timing_signal: IMPACT Commerce selected as new digital commerce partner in February 2026 and new CEO Fredrik Malm with a transformation mandate — both creating an active partner selection window right now.
core_problem: GANT.com showed zero YoY growth in 2024 and Zalando dominates Norwegian digital fashion — without superior personalization and Club GANT data activation on the new stack, GANT.no cannot defend DTC margins.
tech_stack_highlight: Salesforce Commerce Cloud; Contentful CMS; Mastercard Dynamic Yield for personalization; Cegid POS/omnichannel; Ingrid delivery platform; Club GANT loyalty program. IMPACT Commerce as new digital commerce partner (Feb 2026).

name: Jernia
entry_offer: Commerce Optimization Pilot — SAP Commerce Cloud search and attribute optimization + B2B catalog structure. 6–8 week audit of product attributes, search quality and B2B catalog against Bluestone PIM — deliver gap report + 90-day roadmap + POC on one product category.
primary_buyer_title: Digital Product Owner, Jernia
buyer_outreach_angle: Palas owns the SAP Commerce Cloud platform post-Bluestone PIM implementation — he is in the optimization phase right now and is the operational buyer for the next commerce improvement cycle.
timing_signal: Bluestone PIM recently implemented via Impact Commerce and SAP Commerce Cloud is live — the next optimization phase starts now, and ecommerce at ~27% of revenue (USD 31.1M) makes search and attribute quality directly material to top-line.
core_problem: Jernia has built the right platform stack (SAP Commerce Cloud + Bluestone PIM + Infor ERP) but the optimization layer is missing — technical product attributes for tools and hardware tradespeople are underdeveloped in both B2C and B2B catalogs.
tech_stack_highlight: SAP Commerce Cloud (confirmed); Bluestone PIM recently implemented via Impact Commerce; Infor CloudSuite ERP; RELEX supply chain planning; SAP CRM. CENTURIE group also owns Järnia (SE) and F&H grossist — group expansion path.

name: Nille
entry_offer: Commerce Optimization Pilot — seasonal data, product catalog and digital discovery. Map product data flow for seasonal assortment (e.g. Christmas catalog) from buying to webshop display — deliver gap analysis + roadmap + concrete search and product presentation improvements.
primary_buyer_title: Digital / Retail Transformation Lead (RetailTech 2024 presenter), Nille
buyer_outreach_angle: Arvid presented Nille's digital journey at RetailTech 2024 — the company is openly seeking digital partners and he is the accessible operational buyer in an active platform optimization phase.
timing_signal: Active brand repositioning from discount to 'more than discount' retailer, marketing director position open for recruitment (March 2026), and Optimizely/Geta Commerce platform mature for the next optimization layer.
core_problem: 370 stores and a seasonally rotating assortment creates extreme product data management complexity — Nille shifts large portions of its catalog per season (Christmas, Easter, Halloween, summer) and handles it manually without a standalone PIM.
tech_stack_highlight: Optimizely (Geta Commerce for Optimizely) ecommerce platform; Microsoft Dynamics NAV + LS NAV ERP; Bedege integration platform connecting WMS, ecommerce, member club and BI. No confirmed standalone PIM — product data gaps confirmed in Geta case study.

name: Møbelringen
entry_offer: PIM Optimization and Franchise Catalog Harmonization — Akeneo-based assessment of data model, attribute structure and content quality across 70 independent franchise stores. Deliver harmonization plan and improvement roadmap.
primary_buyer_title: CEO, Møbelringen AS
buyer_outreach_angle: Akeneo PIM is newly installed and online sales more than doubled YoY in January 2026 — EBITDA doubled to NOK 113M, giving Henning both the budget and the urgency to scale the digital infrastructure.
timing_signal: Online sales more than doubled YoY in January 2026 (105%+ digital growth over the past year) — the cooperative's 70 independent stores each approach product data differently, creating a fragmentation problem that becomes critical at this growth rate.
core_problem: 70 independent franchise stores with Akeneo PIM newly installed means inconsistent product data quality and attribute structure across the catalog — harmonization is the prerequisite for sustainable digital growth.
tech_stack_highlight: Adobe Commerce (headless); Akeneo PIM (recently installed); Hygraph CMS; Next.js/Vercel frontend; Elasticsearch; Alpha Solutions as platform partner. JAKALA enters on the data quality layer on top of Alpha's platform work.

name: Sport Holding
entry_offer: Commerce Optimization Pilot — group-level product data and digital structure diagnostic across 2–3 chains (e.g. Sport 1 + Intersport). Map product data maturity and consolidation roadmap across 7 chains and 360+ stores.
primary_buyer_title: CEO (new), Sport Holding AS
buyer_outreach_angle: Anders Fjeld took over as new CEO in late 2024 — he is in his strategic agenda-setting window for the next 3–5 years and a group-level digital diagnostic is a natural early move for any incoming CEO.
timing_signal: New CEO Anders Fjeld (late 2024) + new logistics center at Gardermoen (2025) = active investment cycle and strategic reset window. Intersport International alignment also creates pressure to harmonize Norwegian digital catalog with global standards.
core_problem: 7 chains with separate ecommerce platforms and likely fragmented product data structures — post-Gresvig legacy infrastructure has not been modernized, and Bergans of Norway D2C adds multi-brand complexity on top of the franchise structure.
tech_stack_highlight: Separate ecommerce platforms per chain (sport1.no, intersport.no, antonsport.no, bergans.com); Evidi digital service platform at Intersport Norge; StrongPoint click & collect lockers. No confirmed group-level CDO or PIM.

name: Bulder Bank
entry_offer: AI Readiness Diagnostic — personalization, customer insight and data platform assessment. Identify the gap between current data platform and a personalized banking experience, and quantify the value of closing it on the path to NOK 100 billion in lending.
primary_buyer_title: Executive Director, Bulder Bank / Sparebanken Norge
buyer_outreach_angle: Bulder was named Norway's most innovative company (NHH 2025) and is targeting NOK 100B in lending — personalization is the stated next growth driver, and Simen is the strategic owner of that agenda.
timing_signal: The Sparebanken Vest + Sparebanken Sør merger completed May 2025 creating Sparebanken Norge — data integration and platform consolidation is an immediate priority, and new CPO Nicolai Hope Møller joined with an explicit product development mandate.
core_problem: Bulder has 109,600 customers and grows through word-of-mouth, but has not yet activated personalized financial advice at scale — closing the gap between data richness and personalized experience is the next growth lever toward 100B in lending.
tech_stack_highlight: API-based modern architecture with Subaio and Payr for subscription management; 100% digital, no branches. Secondary buyer: Nicolai Hope Møller (CPO, new role 2024/2025). Post-merger integration with Sparebanken Norge creates data consolidation urgency.

name: Sparebanken Norge
entry_offer: AI Readiness Diagnostic — post-merger customer data and personalization readiness. Map AI maturity across the two merged bank entities, identify data silos and personalization gaps, and deliver a roadmap for AI-driven banking experience.
primary_buyer_title: Executive Director Technology and Development, Sparebanken Norge
buyer_outreach_angle: Siren is new in her role post-merger (joined May 2025) and is building a unified technology strategy — she is actively seeking external validation and strategic advisory as she consolidates two bank IT organizations.
timing_signal: Merger of Sparebanken Vest and Sparebanken Sør completed May 2025, followed by Oslofjord Sparebank fusion in Q4 2025 — three merged data sets and technology organizations create immediate AI readiness and consolidation need.
core_problem: AI chatbot Sørensen is live (300,000+ conversations, 89% resolution rate) but personalization and AI-driven advisory is the next layer — and neobanks like Bulder are taking younger customers by offering proactive, personalized banking.
tech_stack_highlight: AI chatbot Sørensen live (Avo Consulting technology, 300K+ conversations); 1,000+ applications in production; SpareBank 1 Utvikling collaboration for tech platform. Post-merger integration in progress across three bank entities.

name: NAF (Norges Automobil-Forbund)
entry_offer: Data Revenue Diagnostic — member data, personalization and EV service differentiation. Map existing data silos (roadside assistance, insurance, vehicle inspection, CRM), assess personalization maturity, and identify top-3 personalization use cases for EV vs. petrol vs. young first-time members.
primary_buyer_title: Head of Technology and Insight / Head of Development, NAF
buyer_outreach_angle: Henrik owns NAF's Azure digital service platform and data strategy — the EV revolution is forcing NAF to differentiate its services by vehicle type, and his stated digital strategy of 'relevant information at the right time in the right place' is an explicit personalization mandate.
timing_signal: Norway's EV share is over 25% and growing — EV owners need fundamentally different services (charging, range, battery health) than petrol drivers, forcing NAF to personalize or lose relevance. Active agile transformation signals openness to external partners.
core_problem: NAF has 500,000 members with rich behavioral data across roadside assistance, insurance, inspections and travel — but each member interaction starts nearly from scratch, with no personalization connecting the service history to the next offer.
tech_stack_highlight: Microsoft Azure cloud-first strategy confirmed; digital service platform (Azure-based, own development); NAF app (iOS + Android, updated Oct 2025). Forte Digital is existing platform partner — JAKALA differentiates on the data/AI layer.

name: Kitch'n (Homeco)
entry_offer: Data Revenue Unlock Pilot — loyalty data activation and personalized purchase experience for Kitch'n Club members. Analyze how 1.35M+ Norwegian loyalty members' data is used today vs. personalized product recommendations, email/push, and cross-brand opportunities.
primary_buyer_title: Group CDO / Digital Director, Homeco AS (not yet identified — research ongoing)
buyer_outreach_angle: Homeco grew +15% revenue and +24% EBITDA — the group is in a strong investment position and the newly implemented InStock WMS creates a natural next step toward personalized customer experience on top of better order data.
timing_signal: New InStock WMS recently implemented and Homeco group showing +15%/+24% EBITDA growth — strong financial momentum creates investment capacity, and 1.35M loyalty members with no known AI/personalization initiatives is a clear gap.
core_problem: Kitch'n has one of Norway's largest loyalty programs (1.35M+ members) with rich kitchen and lifestyle purchase data — but no known AI or personalization initiatives means this asset is almost entirely untapped.
tech_stack_highlight: EG Software for POS, loyalty and order handling; InStock WMS (iSYS) recently implemented; Enfinity AS for ecommerce; multi-brand structure (Kitch'n, Tilbords, Cervera in Sweden). PIM/product data layer unknown — likely weakest link.

name: Handelshøyskolen BI
entry_offer: Student Journey Digital Experience Audit — map the applicant journey from first digital touchpoint to enrollment, analyze digital onboarding and student engagement, and deliver personalization and digital differentiation recommendations vs. international competitors.
primary_buyer_title: New Rector (recruitment in progress) / Pro-rector team
buyer_outreach_angle: Rector Karen Spens is leaving in August 2026 and the new rector will re-evaluate strategic priorities — positioning JAKALA before the new leader sets their agenda provides a first-mover advantage in the strategic planning process.
timing_signal: Rector Karen Spens announced she is not seeking reappointment (June 2025) — the incoming new rector will reset strategic priorities from August 2026, creating a positioning window now before the new agenda is locked.
core_problem: 21,000 students, international competition from HEC Paris, LBS and Bocconi, and a shrinking cohort of 19-year-olds over the next 5 years means BI must win the digital applicant journey to sustain enrollment — but the student digital experience likely lags the faculty's own digital strategy courses.
tech_stack_highlight: Likely Salesforce CRM and Canvas/Moodle LMS (not confirmed). BI strategy 2025 explicitly names modular digital architecture and data access as priorities. NOK 102,000/year bachelor price signals strong investment capacity.

name: Kristiania Høyskole
entry_offer: Digital Student Experience Audit — benchmark Kristiania's digital applicant journey against BI and international competitors, analyze digital onboarding and student engagement, and deliver a personalized recruitment and digital channel roadmap.
primary_buyer_title: CEO / Rector-designate (combined role from August 2026), Kristiania Høyskole
buyer_outreach_angle: Solfrid is a former marketing director from both Norsk Folkemuseum and BI — she has a commercial orientation and will be setting her strategic agenda for the next growth phase when she takes the combined CEO/Rector role in August 2026.
timing_signal: New organizational model adopted December 2025 with Solfrid Lind taking combined Rector/CEO role from August 2026 — strategic agenda reset is coming, and Kristiania's acquisition of Intendia Professional creates new B2B segment digital channel needs.
core_problem: Norway's fastest-growing private university college (3x students in 10 years) is now competing intensively for applicants against BI, OsloMet and NTNU — digital applicant journey quality is a direct enrollment driver at this growth scale.
tech_stack_highlight: Mentimeter and Feedbackfruits in use for digital learning; specific CRM and SIS systems unknown. NOK 800M revenue. Intendia Professional newly acquired — creates B2B/corporate segment requiring separate digital channel.

name: XXL Sport & Villmark (Frasers Group)
entry_offer: Commerce Optimization Pilot — SAP Commerce Cloud product catalog and search diagnostic. Audit product attributes, categorization and search quality across xxl.no, xxl.se and xxl.fi. Deliver gap report + 90-day prioritized roadmap for commerce data quality.
primary_buyer_title: Interim CEO (Frasers-insider), XXL ASA
buyer_outreach_angle: Nicholas Fox was installed by Frasers in June 2025 to execute the dual-brand strategy — he needs to show results quickly and a focused, revenue-linked diagnostic on the catalog risk of running Sports Direct and XXL on the same infrastructure is a direct C-suite-level entry.
timing_signal: Sports Direct flagship opening in Helsinki in 2026 using XXL's infrastructure creates immediate dual-brand catalog complexity — two brands, one SAP Commerce Cloud backend, and ~10% revenue decline in 2024 means this is an urgent problem.
core_problem: Post-Frasers acquisition, XXL is running a dual-brand strategy (XXL + Sports Direct) on shared infrastructure — product data quality and catalog consistency across 50,000+ SKUs in SAP Commerce Cloud is a direct conversion risk during this transition.
tech_stack_highlight: SAP Commerce Cloud confirmed; Amazon CloudFront CDN; React + jQuery frontend; 50,000+ SKUs across NO/SE/FI markets. ~20–25% ecommerce share of ~NOK 7B revenue. Frasers Plus loyalty program globally — Nordic integration not yet confirmed.

name: Strai Kjøkken
entry_offer: Commerce Optimization Pilot — digital configurator and lead generation for 12-store network. Build a pilot that increases lead-to-meeting conversion for one Strai store (e.g. Stavanger or Kristiansand) within 90 days by enabling customers to configure and qualify themselves digitally.
primary_buyer_title: Family owner / 4th generation leadership, Strai Kjøkken
buyer_outreach_angle: Strai set a sales record in 2024 and the factory is running at record production (2,000 kitchens per half-year) — the bottleneck is the sales pipeline, not production capacity, and Odoo ERP is already in place signaling digital investment willingness.
timing_signal: New sales record in 2024 and record production in H1 2024 — factory can take more volume but the constraint is the digital sales pipeline. Odoo ERP recently implemented, proving willingness to invest in system modernization.
core_problem: Made-to-order custom kitchen production with 12 stores but no online self-service configurator — customers who start their research digitally cannot qualify themselves before meeting a designer, creating a conversion bottleneck in the sales funnel.
tech_stack_highlight: Odoo ERP/CRM recently implemented (documented case on odoo.com). No online product configurator. 12 owned stores + distributor network. Strai Proff B2B program for project market and contractors.

name: Coop Norge
entry_offer: Data Revenue Diagnostic — product data quality assessment and digital channel revenue analysis across Coop's member-owned cooperative structure. Quantify the revenue opportunity from improved product discovery and loyalty data activation.
primary_buyer_title: Head of Digital / Digital Director or CTO, Coop Norge
buyer_outreach_angle: Coop's member data and product catalog are significant but underutilized assets — as IT modernization and ecommerce platform upgrades are ongoing, a data revenue diagnostic arrives at exactly the right moment in the investment cycle.
timing_signal: Digital transformation is ongoing at Coop with IT modernization and ecommerce platform upgrades — entry point opens as new platform investments are made and the question becomes 'how do we use this data better?'
core_problem: As one of Norway's two largest grocery retail groups, Coop has a large product catalog and member loyalty data but is constrained by the cooperative structure's complex data governance — improving digital discovery and loyalty personalization drives direct revenue.
tech_stack_highlight: Multi-format retail (hypermarkets, supermarkets, convenience, online); member-owned cooperative structure creates complexity in data governance. Ecommerce platform details not confirmed. Growing ecommerce ambitions with IT modernization in progress.

name: Europris
entry_offer: Data Revenue Diagnostic — product catalog health check and digital channel revenue assessment. Assess how effectively the high-SKU, seasonally rotating catalog is driving digital revenue and where product data quality improvements deliver the fastest uplift.
primary_buyer_title: Head of Digital / Digital Director, Europris ASA
buyer_outreach_angle: Europris is listed on Oslo Stock Exchange — digital performance is under investor scrutiny and growing ecommerce investment means that product data quality and digital discovery improvements have direct, visible financial impact.
timing_signal: Listed company with growing ecommerce ambitions and investor-visible digital performance — any initiative with clear digital revenue ROI gets leadership attention, and Europris has 270+ stores and a complex seasonal catalog that creates structural product data challenges.
core_problem: Europris has Norway's largest discount variety retailer catalog across diverse categories (household, garden, toys, food) — helping customers find the right product online in a high-SKU, seasonally rotating range requires structural product data improvement.
tech_stack_highlight: 270+ stores in Norway; listed on Oslo Stock Exchange. Ecommerce platform and PIM details not confirmed. High SKU count across diverse categories. Digital performance under investor visibility.

name: Clas Ohlson
entry_offer: Data Revenue Diagnostic — product data quality and search/discovery performance assessment across 30,000 technical SKUs. Quantify where product data gaps are costing conversion and deliver a prioritized fix roadmap.
primary_buyer_title: Director Customer, Brand and People (CMO / CHRO / CSO), Clas Ohlson
buyer_outreach_angle: Helena owns customer experience and brand at Clas Ohlson — a distribution automation investment is underway, creating internal pressure to align product discovery digitally with the improved fulfillment capability.
timing_signal: Distribution center automation investment creates internal pressure to improve digital product discovery to match the improved logistics capability — and as a listed company (Nasdaq Stockholm), digital performance is directly visible to investors.
core_problem: Clas Ohlson sells 30,000 technical products where customers rely on accurate product data and smart search to find the right drill bit, adapter or cable — poor product data quality directly translates to lost conversions in a high-SKU technical catalog.
tech_stack_highlight: 30,000+ SKUs across tools, electronics, hardware, storage, lighting; stores in Sweden, Norway, Finland, UK. Listed on Nasdaq Stockholm. Complex technical product specs are the core catalog challenge.

name: Bohus
entry_offer: Commerce Optimization Diagnostic — product data and digital conversion review. Benchmark bohus.no product data model and attribute structure against IKEA.no and skeidar.no, identify top conversion leakage categories, and deliver a prioritized improvement list with ROI estimate.
primary_buyer_title: Marketing Director, Bohus
buyer_outreach_angle: Janicke led the media agency switch from dentsu to Wavemaker (WPP) in January 2026 — she is in active strategic repositioning mode and the next logical conversation is whether the digital product experience matches the new media investment.
timing_signal: Full central chain operation from January 2026 (organizational consolidation of four ownership groups) and media agency switch to Wavemaker — active transformation period with new partners being invited in across functions.
core_problem: Bohus wins on brand (Norway's Customer Satisfaction winner 2025) but loses customers to IKEA digitally — the bottleneck is product data quality and digital presentation for high-complexity furniture (dimensions, materials, variants, configurations) not search or media.
tech_stack_highlight: SAP ERP (confirmed via Jungheinrich WCS integration); automated central warehouse (Jungheinrich, 10,000+ pallet places + 22,000 miniload places); ecommerce platform likely Adobe Commerce/Magento (not publicly confirmed). US$46.3M ecommerce revenue (2024). No confirmed AI/personalization initiatives.
